summary: Comprehensive testing of Booking Detail feature for B2B Travel Platform. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional for My Bookings page and BookingDetail page with all required components.

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (span inside tbody/select/option) - these are React hydration warnings from the Emergent preview environment, not actual bugs

critical_code_review_comments: The console warnings about HTML hydration errors (span inside tbody, tr, select, option) appear to be from the Emergent preview environment's instrumentation, not actual code issues. The app functions correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test traveler data created during pytest runs with TEST_ prefix (TEST_John Doe)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking Detail feature fully tested. 2 held bookings exist in database. Traveler data can be saved and persisted. All collapsible sections work. Navigation between My Bookings and BookingDetail works correctly.

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Returns access_token for agent login
backend_apis.GET /api/held-bookings: PASSED - Returns list of held bookings for current user (2 bookings found)
backend_apis.GET /api/held-bookings/{id}: PASSED - Returns full booking detail with booking, proposal, terms, expert, user objects
backend_apis.PUT /api/bookings/{id}/travelers: PASSED - Saves traveler data and persists to database
backend_apis.Booking data structure: PASSED - All required fields present for UI rendering

My_Bookings_Page.page_load: PASSED - My Bookings page loads via My Leads dropdown
My_Bookings_Page.data_table: PASSED - Shows 2 held bookings with Reference, Type, Status, Book Time, Travel Date, Booked By, Name, Destinations, Total Amount, Pending Amount columns
My_Bookings_Page.filter_bar: PASSED - Date range, date type, status, destination, search filters present
My_Bookings_Page.summary: PASSED - Shows Trips Shown count and Amount totals
My_Bookings_Page.booking_reference_click: PASSED - Clicking booking reference navigates to BookingDetail page

BookingDetail_Page.trip_reference_header: PASSED - Shows ORN reference, proposal name, guest info (name, email, phone, travel date, guests, submitted date)
BookingDetail_Page.booking_status_badge: PASSED - Shows 'BLOCKED' status badge for held bookings
BookingDetail_Page.payment_details_section: PASSED - Shows Total Net Price, payment table, Outstanding Amount, Click to pay button
BookingDetail_Page.hold_warning: PASSED - Shows amber warning with hold expiry date
BookingDetail_Page.attached_trips: PASSED - Shows destination, nights, rooms, adults
BookingDetail_Page.hotel_cards: PASSED - Shows hotel image, name, stars, address, check-in/out, room type, meals, nights, confirmation status, Download Voucher button
BookingDetail_Page.traveler_form: PASSED - Shows Title, First Name, Last Name, Nationality, DOB, Passport Number, Passport Expiry, Upload Documents fields
BookingDetail_Page.traveler_data_prefill: PASSED - Previously saved traveler data (TEST_John Doe) appears pre-filled
BookingDetail_Page.save_travelers_button: PASSED - SAVE TRAVELER INFORMATION button present and functional
BookingDetail_Page.collapsible_sections: PASSED - All 7 sections present: Important Notes, Terms and Conditions, Our Scope of Services, Payment Policies, Airline Policy, Hotel and Land Cancellation Policy, Amendment of Booking by Guest
BookingDetail_Page.seller_details_sidebar: PASSED - Shows company name, agent name, email, phone, Add Trip Change Request button
BookingDetail_Page.booking_summary_sidebar: PASSED - Shows Reference, Destinations, Travel Date, Duration, Hold Until, Total
BookingDetail_Page.back_button: PASSED - Back to My Bookings button navigates back correctly
BookingDetail_Page.view_quote_button: PASSED - View Quote button present in header

mocked_apis_note: None - all APIs are real implementations
